# ⚙️ Infrastructure (306)

The unglamorous layer that decides whether your AI ships or stalls. Serve models fast, store embeddings, route traffic, watch costs, and keep the whole stack observable in production.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

## Inference Server

Serve models with blazing throughput and low latency under real traffic

- [triton-lang/triton-ext](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton-ext) — ⭐ 26 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This repository contains a collection of out-of-tree extensions designed to enhance the capabilities and functionality of the Triton language and compiler. - [openhwgroup/core-et](https://github.com/openhwgroup/core-et) — ⭐ 25 · `SystemVerilog` · Library — CORE-ET is a Silicon Platform project, implemented in SystemVerilog, focused on Register-Transfer Level (RTL) development for digital circuits, representing a foundational design for hardware components.

## Vector DB

Store and search billions of embeddings in milliseconds for RAG and semantic search

<details>
<summary>Show 12 repos</summary>

It is designed for large-scale vector processing scenarios, often used in applications like RAG systems and recommendation engines.
- [surrealdb/surrealdb](https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb) — ⭐ 32,206 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — SurrealDB is a scalable, distributed, and collaborative document-graph database designed for real-time web applications. It integrates document, graph, relational, and vector search capabilities into a single database system with a unified query language.
- [chroma-core/chroma](https://github.com/chroma-core/chroma) — ⭐ 27,810 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — Chroma provides search infrastructure specifically designed for AI applications, functioning as a vector database. It helps AI agents and models store, search, and manage embeddings efficiently.
- [lance-format/lance](https://github.com/lance-format/lance) — ⭐ 6,456 · `Rust` · Library — Lance is an open-source lakehouse data format designed for multimodal AI, offering 100x faster random access, vector indexing, and data versioning compared to Parquet. It supports mixed search (vector, full-text, SQL) and integrates with popular data tools like Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, and PyTorch.
- [HelixDB/helix-db](https://github.com/HelixDB/helix-db) — ⭐ 4,115 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — HelixDB is an open-source database written in Rust, uniquely combining graph and vector database functionalities. It is specifically designed to support AI applications, especially for Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) tasks.
- [ruvnet/RuVector](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector) — ⭐ 3,906 · `Rust` · Library — RuVector is a high-performance, real-time, self-learning AI vector and Graph Neural Network (GNN) memory database built in Rust. It offers advanced data storage and retrieval capabilities with graph intelligence.
- [ashvardanian/NumKong](https://github.com/ashvardanian/NumKong) — ⭐ 1,812 · `C` · Library — NumKong is a library providing SIMD-accelerated numerical operations, including distances, dot products, and matrix operations, for various data types and architectures. It offers high-performance kernels essential for applications like vector search and information retrieval, with bindings for multiple programming languages.
- [weaviate/recipes](https://github.com/weaviate/recipes) — ⭐ 940 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Tutorial/Course — This repository provides end-to-end Jupyter notebooks demonstrating how to use Weaviate, a vector database. It covers various features and integrations such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), multimodal embeddings, generative AI, and function calling with LLM frameworks.
- [RyanCodrai/turbovec](https://github.com/RyanCodrai/turbovec) — ⭐ 588 · `Rust` · Library — This is a high-performance vector index, implemented in Rust with Python bindings, designed for efficient approximate nearest neighbor search. It leverages the TurboQuant algorithm and SIMD instructions to enable fast retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and embedding-based search.
- [gordonmurray/firnflow](https://github.com/gordonmurray/firnflow) — ⭐ 360 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — Firnflow is a multi-tenant vector and full-text search engine designed for high performance and cost efficiency. It utilizes a tiered storage architecture, combining RAM, NVMe, and S3, to deliver microsecond latency on top of object storage.
- [zhangfengcdt/memoir](https://github.com/zhangfengcdt/memoir) — ⭐ 182 · `Python` · Library — Memoir is a hierarchical memory system with Git-like version control for AI agents. - [omermaksutii/mnemo](https://github.com/omermaksutii/mnemo) — ⭐ 49 · `TypeScript` · MCP Server — Mnemo is an MCP server that provides persistent memory for Claude Code, allowing the AI to recall past project decisions and preferences across sessions. It uses ONNX MiniLM embeddings and an HNSW vector index for semantic retrieval, storing data locally in SQLite.
